name: Plumber
seoParagraph: Plumbing businesses face fierce local competition, making local SEO critical for survival. By implementing specific Plumber schema markup, you directly feed Google vital details about your service areas, emergency availability, and pricing. This targeted structured data drastically increases your chances of triggering the coveted Google Map Pack when customers search for 'plumber near me'.
faqAnswer: While generic LocalBusiness schema is okay, using the specific 'Plumber' schema tells search engines exactly what you do. It unlocks specialized rich snippet opportunities and sends a much stronger relevance signal to Google's local algorithm compared to a broad, unspecific category.
gbpCategories: Plumber, Emergency Plumbing Service, Drainage Service
mapPackTips: Emergency availability is the single biggest competitive advantage in plumbing. Make sure your openingHours schema declares 24/7 availability if you offer it. Use the areaServed property to explicitly list every city and suburb you cover.
metaDescription: Free Plumber schema generator. Build valid JSON-LD with service areas, emergency hours, and NAP data to rank in the Google Map Pack.

name: HVAC Contractor
seoParagraph: HVAC companies rely heavily on highly localized emergency searches. Utilizing the precise HVACBusiness schema allows you to communicate your specialized cooling and heating services directly to search crawlers. This advanced structured data ensures your business stands out in local search results when homeowners desperately need AC repair or heating installation.
faqAnswer: Google's algorithm prioritizes specificity. By utilizing 'HVACBusiness' instead of 'LocalBusiness', you unambiguously categorize your services to match high-intent queries like 'AC repair' or 'furnace installation'.
gbpCategories: HVAC Contractor, Air Conditioning Contractor, Heating Contractor
mapPackTips: HVAC searches spike dramatically during weather events. Include the makesOffer property in your advanced schema to explicitly list services like 'AC Installation' and 'Furnace Repair'.
metaDescription: Free HVAC schema generator. Create HVACBusiness JSON-LD in seconds to boost Google Map Pack rankings for AC repair and heating searches.

name: Electrician
seoParagraph: When electrical emergencies strike, customers don't scroll past the top three map results. Electrician schema markup is a powerful SEO strategy that structures your NAP data perfectly for search engines. This code ensures Google fully understands your specialized electrical services, boosting your local visibility.
faqAnswer: The 'Electrician' schema type is specifically recognized by schema.org. Using it instead of a generic tag prevents ambiguity, ensuring Google instantly recognizes your exact trade.
mapPackTips: Adding a verified contractor license number via the hasCredential property communicates a critical trust signal to both Google's algorithm and the customer.
metaDescription: Free Electrician schema generator. Valid JSON-LD for electrical contractors to dominate the Google Map Pack.

name: Roofing Contractor
seoParagraph: Roofing is a high-ticket local service where trust and proximity are everything. By injecting RoofingContractor schema into your site, you feed Google exact coordinates, service radii, and verified business hours. This specialized JSON-LD code is the secret weapon for capturing high-value roof replacement leads.
faqAnswer: A generic 'LocalBusiness' tag forces Google to guess what your business actually does based on your website text. The 'RoofingContractor' schema removes all guesswork, explicitly declaring your trade.
mapPackTips: Include a detailed areaServed array in your schema listing every city, suburb, and county you serve, because most roofing jobs are won or lost within a 30-mile radius.
metaDescription: Free Roofing Contractor schema generator. Build valid RoofingContractor JSON-LD to rank in the Google Map Pack.

name: Painter
seoParagraph: Painting contractors compete in a market where homeowners get multiple quotes before committing. Implementing PaintingContractor schema markup gives Google a specific, recognized trade classification that separates your business from interior decorators and hardware stores.
faqAnswer: Generic schema cannot communicate whether you specialize in exterior repaints or cabinet refinishing. The PaintingContractor schema gives Google an unambiguous trade classification that directly boosts relevance.
mapPackTips: Use your PaintingContractor schema's areaServed array to list every city you paint in, because project searches are highly location-specific.
metaDescription: Free Painter schema generator. Build valid PaintingContractor JSON-LD to win the Google Map Pack.

name: Cleaning Service
seoParagraph: Whether you offer residential maid services or commercial janitorial work, local search is where your clients are looking. Implementing schema tailored for cleaning businesses clearly defines your service area and operating hours to Google.
faqAnswer: While there isn't a dedicated 'CleaningService' tag in schema.org, utilizing 'ProfessionalService' is far superior to 'LocalBusiness' for categorizing mobile service providers.
mapPackTips: Enable the SAB (Service Area Business) toggle when generating your schema to omit your residential or home-office address to stay compliant with Google Business Profile guidelines.
metaDescription: Free Cleaning Service schema generator. Build ProfessionalService JSON-LD for cleaning businesses.

name: Pest Control
seoParagraph: Pest infestations trigger some of the most panicked local searches on Google. Implementing structured schema tells Google that your business is the authoritative local answer for these high-urgency queries.
faqAnswer: Using specific schema creates the contextual signals Google needs to match your business with specific queries like 'termite treatment near me' instead of generic tags.
mapPackTips: Urgency is key. If you offer 24/7 pest removal, make sure your schema openingHours reflect that.
metaDescription: Generate precise JSON-LD schema for your Pest Control business. Improve local SEO and capture urgent exterminator searches.

name: Handyman

mapPackTips: Because a handyman does a little bit of everything, having detailed schema is crucial. Make sure you use the SAB feature to hide your residential address.
metaDescription: Generate JSON-LD schema for your Handyman business. Rank higher in the Google Map Pack for various local home repair searches.

metaDescription: Free Garage Door Repair schema generator. Create JSON-LD with emergency availability and service areas to dominate the local Map Pack.

name: Landscaper

name: Locksmith

metaDescription: Free Locksmith schema generator. Build accurate JSON-LD for your mobile or storefront locksmith business.

name: Law Firm
seoParagraph: For law firms, acquiring a single local client can mean thousands of dollars in revenue. LegalService schema is essential for helping search engines distinguish your exact practice areas.
faqAnswer: The 'LegalService' schema type provides critical context to search engines about your specific profession and YMYL authority.
mapPackTips: Include the sameAs property linking to your state bar profile and Avvo listing to give Google verifiable, third-party confirmation of your credentials.
metaDescription: Free Law Firm schema generator. Create LegalService JSON-LD for any practice area.

name: Restaurant

faqAnswer: Unlike generic businesses, restaurants have unique data points. The 'Restaurant' schema enables properties like 'servesCuisine' and 'hasMenu'.
mapPackTips: Set your openingHoursSpecification with maximum precision, including separate lunch vs. dinner service windows to capture 'open now' dining searches.
metaDescription: Free Restaurant schema generator. Create JSON-LD with cuisine type and menu URL to rank your restaurant locally.

mapPackTips: Ensure your schema hours perfectly match your GBP hours, especially for early morning openings, to capture the breakfast crowd.
metaDescription: Free Bakery schema generator. Create perfectly formatted JSON-LD for your bakery to rank higher in local searches.
